saved_test.name: There Is / There Are — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for there is / there are constructions: singular vs plural, affirmative, negative, questions, past tense, present perfect, modals, formal/academic, literary inversions across A1–C2.
